issues.summary: 1 recent cancellation(s) completed cleanly with deterministic cleanup.
issues.remediation: No action required. Use `rch status --json` to inspect cancellation metadata if debugging build interruptions.

issues.summary: 3 active build(s) have stale progress while hook heartbeats remain fresh; queued validations may stall behind build 29878602124231205 on worker ts2.
issues.remediation: Inspect with `rch queue --json`; if progress remains stale, run `rch cancel 29878602124231205`. If this repeats on ts2, drain it with `rch workers drain ts2` before retrying validation.
